news.t: DDWM Delivers on Diversification With Currency Protection

holdings.infoBox: DDWM is an equity ETF with a total of 1459 individual holdings. The top holdings are HSBC Holdings stock at 1.66%, Intesa Sanpaolo at 1.17%, Nestlé at 1.15%, Novartis AG at 1.15%, and Roche Holding AG at 1.04%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Dynamic International Equity Fund (DDWM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of dividend-paying developed-market equities outside the US and Canada. The index dynamically hedges currency exposure for USD investors based on three equal-weighted signals. DDWM was launched on Jan 7, 2016 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: DDWM Delivers on Diversification With Currency Protection
data.text: One of the primary reasons for embracing ex-U.S. stocks is diversification or reducing correlations within U.S.-heavy portfolios. Thanks to single-country ETFs, it's much easier for U.S. market partic...
